improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try 3 free searches, then join from US$2/day."><meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta property="og:description" content="Instant AI answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace for business owners and traders. Powered by Claude. Try free, then join from US$2/day."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:image" content="https://yourdomain.com/og-image.jpg"><meta property="og:url" content="https://yourdomain.com/"><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image"><meta name="twitter:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta name="twitter:description" content="Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business professionals. Instant answers, voice chat, unlimited workspace. Try 3 free searches.">
improvements.rationale: A compelling meta description improves click-through rates from search results by clearly communicating the product value and free trial offer. Open Graph and Twitter Card tags ensure professional, branded previews when the homepage is shared on LinkedIn, Facebook, or Twitter—critical for a B2B audience of business owners and traders who often discover tools through social sharing.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice chat support, and a dedicated workspace built for professionals. Try three free searches today."
improvements.rationale: This headline immediately introduces Gideon by name, establishing brand identity while clearly communicating the core value proposition. The subheading highlights three key benefits (instant answers, voice chat, workspace) that differentiate the product, then closes with a clear, low-friction CTA referencing the free trial without overpromising. The copy is concise, professional, and conversion-focused without invented claims.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to choose a membership plan that fits your needs. Plans start from just US$2 per day, and you'll unlock unlimited access to Gideon's full capabilities—including voice chat, your personal members workspace, and professional trade and business support. Annual billing saves you 30 percent.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common conversion-point question: what happens at the paywall. It reassures prospects by explaining the transition clearly, reinforces value (unlimited access, voice chat, workspace), and highlights the annual savings—all without pressure. Reducing uncertainty at this stage helps move hesitant visitors toward membership.
